overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban downtown street, ascending a pedestrian overpass, crossing an elevated walkway, and descending back to street level. The scene features futuristic architecture, digital billboards, wet reflective pavement, and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with zebra crossing and neon storefronts

events.description: green sports car with headlights on passes by on the right side of the street
steps onto the orange textured sidewalk pavement from the asphalt crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the city street, moving from the crosswalk onto the distinctive orange sidewalk

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving past with headlights illuminating the wet road surface

entered.detail: prominent yellow striped crosswalk markings on the dark asphalt road
glowing green and white commercial signage on building facades
metal walkway structure spanning between buildings above the street
multi-story urban structures with dark facades lining the street
distinctive orange geometric patterned sidewalk tiles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a nighttime city street with a yellow zebra crossing in the foreground. The camera moves forward onto an orange textured sidewalk, passing neon shop signs while a green sports car drives by on the right. Tall concrete buildings line both sides of the street, with an overhead pedestrian bridge visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with digital advertising displays approaching stairway

events.description: large vertical support column temporarily blocks the right side of the view
slows slightly while approaching the stairway entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the orange-paved sidewalk, passing digital billboards and approaching a stairway entrance between buildings

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing walking down the sidewalk toward the camera

entered.detail: large curved display showing animated character advertisements with purple and pink hues
green and white painted stairs leading upward between building structures
thick cylindrical pole supporting the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: Walking along the orange sidewalk past large digital advertising screens on the left, the camera approaches a stairway entrance ahead. A pedestrian in red walks toward the camera while vehicles continue to pass on the right. The overhead pedestrian bridge structure becomes more prominent overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed concrete stairway ascending between buildings

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairway to the elevated walkway
moves from open street level into the enclosed stairwell environment

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs with green railings to reach the elevated pedestrian walkway above

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket ascending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: grey concrete steps with green painted side walls and metal handrails
teal-colored metal handrails running along the left side of the stairs
enclosed vertical passage between dark building structures with overhead piping

segments.scene_description: The camera begins ascending a concrete stairway with green painted railings, leaving the street level behind. A pedestrian in white walks ahead up the stairs. The environment becomes more enclosed between building structures, with industrial elements visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with industrial fencing overlooking the street below

events.description: emerges from stairway onto the elevated walkway platform with metal fencing
metal mesh fencing creates a patterned grid view of the street and traffic below

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated pedestrian bridge, observing the city lights and traffic through the metal fencing

entered.detail: concrete pedestrian bridge with green painted floor and overhead cover
chain-link security barriers lining both sides of the walkway
large cylindrical pipes and structural steel beams above the walkway
illuminated advertisements visible through the fence mesh showing animated characters
tall dark monolith with glowing vertical yellow lines marking the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an elevated walkway, the camera moves forward along a concrete platform enclosed by metal mesh fencing. Industrial piping runs overhead while digital screens on nearby buildings are visible through the fence. The walkway leads toward a distinctive vertical structure with glowing yellow neon lines at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending stairway returning to street level with neon accent lighting

events.description: begins descending the stairs at the far end of the elevated walkway
exits the stairway back onto the street level with visible traffic

agents.ego_description: walking down the concrete stairs to return to street level, passing other pedestrians on the way

notable_agents.action: person in colorful outfit ascending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: concrete steps leading downward with green railings on the sides
view of the road and vehicles visible at the bottom of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a stairway at the end of the elevated walkway, passing a pedestrian coming up. The vertical neon-lit structure becomes prominent on the right as the camera approaches street level, where vehicles and the urban street environment become visible again.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit city street, ascending an industrial overpass, and descending back into the urban bustle. It begins by crossing a yellow zebra crossing and moving along an orange textured sidewalk, passing glowing shop signs and a green sports car. As the camera passes large digital advertising screens and oncoming pedestrians, the scene shifts from the open road toward a concrete stairway with green railings. The camera then ascends these stairs and emerges onto an elevated walkway enclosed by metal mesh fencing and overhead industrial piping, moving toward a distant vertical structure accented with glowing yellow neon. Finally, the camera descends a second stairway, passing a pedestrian and returning to street level as the traffic and city environment reappear.
